title: Wifi Tester
description: A modern, accessible, no-backend Wi‑Fi strength and speed indicator inspired by fast.com. Built with React, Vite, Tailwind, and Framer Motion.

title: Nike Shoes Modern Business Landing Page
description: A responsive, animated landing page for a Nike-themed shoe store built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

title: Dark Aesthetic Portfolio
description: A sleek dark-themed personal portfolio website showcasing development projects with smooth animations and modern UI design. Built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

title: Couple Simple Responsive Portfolio
description: A simple, responsive portfolio website for a couple, showcasing their love story and shared interests. Built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

title: PHP Enrollment System
description: A mobile-first web application that helps users discover recipes based on available ingredients. Includes dietary filters, step-by-step instructions, and nutritional information.

title: PHP blog system
description: A progressive web app for tracking workouts, nutrition, and fitness goals. Includes exercise database, workout planning, and progress visualization.

title: Wedding Web Portfolio
description: A modern blog platform with AI-assisted content generation. Features include markdown support, syntax highlighting, and automated content suggestions.

title: AnimeVerse-Dive into the universe of anime.
description: Animeverse is a web platform where anime lovers can discover, browse, and enjoy titles from every genre. Whether you’re into action, romance, fantasy, or slice-of-life, AniSphere makes finding your next favorite series simple and fun.

title: Football Hub
description: FootballHub brings fans closer to the game — offering live scores, team insights, fixtures, and the latest football news, all in one easy-to-use platform.

title: Recipe Finder
description: A web application that helps users discover recipes based on available ingredients. Includes dietary filters, step-by-step instructions, and nutritional information.
